original_image_tags: Cartoon depicting a swamp scene with trees and water. Three figures in flying saucers hover above. One figure in a flying saucer has a speech bubble. A signpost reads "THE SWAMP GAS IS RESTLESS TONIGHT."
Headshot photograph of a man. Caption: GABRIEL GREEN Head Saucerer
Photograph of a man standing outdoors. Caption: GARY WILCOX

elements.description: A black-and-white cartoon depicting two men looking at a flying saucer in the sky. The saucer is emitting a beam of light. A speech bubble above one man says, 'PARKING IN MY BACK YARD AND THE GREENS—I HARDLY CALL THAT INTELLIGENT LIFE FROM ANOTHER PLANET.' A caption below the image reads, 'From R.C., the Post, May 9, 1966.'
A black-and-white headshot photograph of a man wearing a suit and tie, smiling. A caption above the photo reads 'GABRIEL GREEN'.

A black-and-white photograph showing a dark, indistinct object in the sky above a road or parking lot, with cars visible in the background. A caption below the photo reads 'SAUCER OR STRAW HAT, THIS FLEW IN CALIFORNIA LAST AUGUST. Highway Patrolman Helj Filmerphotographed It Through His Car Windshield'.

A black-and-white hand-drawn sketch depicting a large, dark, triangular or delta-shaped object hovering in the sky above a landscape. A caption below the sketch reads 'By flying-saucer-sighting time and I'm determined to see one' and is signed '3-25-66'.
A black-and-white photograph showing a group of people, including men and women, standing and looking upwards towards the sky. The setting appears to be outdoors at night or in low light.
A black-and-white photograph showing a dark, blurry object in the sky, possibly over a landscape or water. The image is grainy and the object is indistinct.
A black-and-white photograph showing a man standing next to a large, dark, circular or oval-shaped object that appears to be resting on the ground. The man is pointing at the object.

judge.reason: Description A describes a single cartoon with three flying saucers, while Description B describes a completely different set of images (a newspaper clipping cartoon with two men, multiple distinct photographs, and a sketch) with no overlap in the described visual content.
